Industries We Serve

Solutions for Your Sector

Every industry has unique safety requirements. We build compliance-ready solutions that fit.

Commercial

Office Blocks, Retail & Mixed-Use

Integrated fire detection, CCTV cameras, access control and electrical systems that scale with occupancy and meet all insurance and regulatory requirements.

  • Addressable fire alarm systems
  • HD CCTV & access control
  • Emergency lighting & evacuation
  • Certified PPE & safety footwear
Get a Quote
Industrial

Factories, Warehouses & Heavy Industry

Ruggedised fire suppression, gas detection, CCTV surveillance, robust electrical infrastructure and certified safety footwear for every worker on site.

  • Gas & flame detection systems
  • Industrial sprinkler & suppression
  • Safety Jogger certified footwear
  • Site-specific risk assessments
Industrial Audit
Healthcare

Hospitals, Clinics & Medical Facilities

Life-safety systems from sensitive multi-criteria smoke detection to zoned evacuation, plus anti-static safety footwear for clinical and lab staff.

  • Multi-criteria clinical detection
  • Patient ward evacuation systems
  • First aid & emergency supply
  • Anti-static safety footwear
Healthcare Quote
Education

Schools, Universities & Training Centres

Compliant fire alarms, CCTV camera networks, access control and certified safety training programmes for teaching and admin staff.

  • Networked fire alarm & PA systems
  • CCTV & campus access control
  • Fire drills & staff training
  • Safety signage & evacuation plans
Education Quote
Residential

Homes, Estates & Multi-Dwelling Units

Smart smoke detectors, intruder alarms, HD CCTV cameras, intercom systems and electrical safety inspections for homeowners and property managers.

  • Smart smoke & CO detection
  • Intruder alarm & CCTV cameras
  • Intercom & access entry
  • Electrical safety inspections

Our Complete Fire Equipment Range
What We Supply

Fire Equipment Supplied & Installed

We supply, install and service all classes of fire safety equipment — sourced from certified manufacturers, tested to international standards and backed by service contracts.

Hose Reels & Water MonitorsFixed and portable systems for rapid first-response suppression
Sprinkler SystemsAutomatic ceiling sprinkler networks — design, installation and commissioning
Fire Extinguishers & BucketsCO₂, powder, foam and water — supply, servicing and refills
Fire Alarms & Control PanelsAddressable and conventional alarm systems with zone-mapped panels
Hydrant Valves & Fire PipesCertified hydrant installations and fire main pipework

In Our Inventory

Industrial Fire Cylinders — Ready to Deploy

These are our actual fire suppression cylinders in stock — pressure-tested, certified and available for immediate dispatch. We maintain a fully stocked inventory for residential, commercial and industrial clients.

  • CO₂, powder, foam and water types
  • All cylinders pressure-tested and certified
  • 6-month and annual inspection contracts
  • On-site refill and hydrostatic testing
  • Bulk supply discounts available

Certified Safety Footwear

Safety Jogger Footwear Range

ISO-certified boots and shoes built for industrial, construction and on-site use. Steel-toe protection, anti-slip soles and all-day comfort — in stock now.

ISO Certified
Why Safety Jogger?

Europe's Trusted Safety Footwear Brand

Safety Jogger is a globally recognised brand producing EN ISO 20345 certified safety footwear for industrial and construction environments. We are authorised distributors supplying individuals, companies and bulk corporate orders nationwide.

  • EN ISO 20345:2011 — international standard
  • Steel toe caps — 200-joule impact resistance
  • Anti-penetration midsoles
  • Oil-resistant, anti-slip outsoles
  • Multiple sizes — bulk orders welcome
Order Footwear 08036911154

Our Company

About Bizatech Services

Your trusted partner in safety and technical solutions for over 15 years

15+Years Excellence
Who We Are

Nigeria's Leading Safety & Technical Solutions Provider

Bizatech Services specialises in fire safety, security CCTV cameras, electrical installations, certified Safety Jogger footwear and PPE supply, and professional safety training.

Our goal: protect lives, secure assets, create safer environments. We are authorised Safety Jogger distributors and certified experts across fire, CCTV security and electrical disciplines.

  • Certified fire safety and electrical engineers
  • CCTV camera supply, installation and monitoring
  • Authorised Safety Jogger footwear distributors
  • Nationwide service — residential, commercial & industrial
  • 24/7 emergency response capability

Vision, Mission & Values

Driving excellence in safety services to create a safer world for everyone

Our Direction

The Principles That Drive Us

Every decision, every system, every partnership guided by these beliefs.

Our Vision

To be a trusted leader in safety and technical services, delivering innovative solutions that protect lives and property across Nigeria and beyond.

We envision every workplace, home and public space equipped with the highest safety standards — where our expertise makes a measurable difference.

  • Industry Leadership in Safety Innovation
  • Zero-Accident Workplaces
  • Certified Safety Equipment for All
  • Community Safety Awareness

Our Mission

To provide dependable fire safety, security, CCTV, electrical and training solutions while supplying certified safety equipment and footwear that ensures safer environments for all.

Committed to excellence, continuous improvement and building lasting relationships through exceptional service.

  • Reliable Safety Solutions
  • Full Regulatory Compliance
  • Expert Training & Education
  • Long-term Client Partnerships
